hero.title: New Komitas
hero.subtitle: A new standard of living in the heart of Yerevan

about.p1: New Komitas is an ambitious residential community located on Komitas Avenue — one of Yerevan's most prestigious neighborhoods. This landmark development combines modern architecture with the natural beauty of the surrounding area.
about.p2: Designed for families and professionals who value comfort, security, and a vibrant community atmosphere, New Komitas offers spacious apartments with panoramic views of Mount Ararat and the city skyline.
about.p3: Every detail has been thoughtfully planned — from energy-efficient building systems to lush green courtyards — creating a harmonious living environment that sets a new benchmark for residential development in Armenia.

video.caption: Take a virtual tour of New Komitas
